productDisplayName: Puma Men Cell Turin Perf 2 White Sports Shoes
description: Go that extra mile with ease with the Cell Turin 2 shoes from puma. This running shoe features a sleek, contoured upper, a cushioning midsole and a non-skid rubber sole that offers all that comfort that makes you never want to leave the track.UpperSynthetic leather upper with all over perforated details for breathabilityPadded collar and tongue for snug comfortPatent-leather formstripe logoCushioned collar and tongue for plush comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for durabilityCM-EVA midsole with 10cell technology in the heel and midfoot TPU shank for comfortOrthoLite sockliner for superior comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial functionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole for excellent grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washStore away from sunlight
